page.title: Short-link analytics
page.description: Understand matched requests without storing IP addresses, full referrers, query strings, or user-agent strings.

detail.title: Short-link details
detail.description: Request activity and privacy-preserving dimensions for this tracked link.

metrics.title: Key metrics
metrics.effectiveVisitsDescription: Estimated human entry visits after controlled continuation hops are excluded
metrics.humanClicksDescription: Estimated browser-like navigation requests matched to links
metrics.entryHumanClicksDescription: Estimated browser-like navigations excluding controlled continuation hops
metrics.totalRequestsDescription: Exact request count for tracked routes, including automated traffic
metrics.entryRequestsDescription: Requests excluding verified short-link continuation hops
metrics.declaredBotShareDescription: Requests whose clients identify as bots or preview agents
metrics.suspectedAutomationShareDescription: Requests classified as likely automated, not confirmed bots
metrics.errorsDescription: Matched requests that could not complete normally

trend.title: Visit trend
trend.description: Effective visits compared with matched requests over time.
trend.empty: No requests were observed in this period.
trend.accessibleTitle: Effective visits and matched requests over time

ranking.title: Top routes
ranking.description: Ranked by effective visits in the selected period. Select a route for its details.
ranking.empty: No tracked routes have data for this period.

breakdowns.title: Audience and delivery
breakdowns.sourcesDescription: Referrers, countries, and device types counted across all requests.
breakdowns.attributionDescription: Providers, campaigns, and internal-hop attribution counted across all requests.

quality.title: Measurement notes
quality.description: Estimation rules, data coverage, and caching limits.
quality.humanClickNote: Effective visits exclude declared bots, suspected automation, link previews, and controlled short-link hops.
quality.cacheNote: Cached permanent redirects may not produce a new edge request for every browser visit.
quality.refreshNote: Analytics queries are cached for 15 seconds to speed up filter changes. Refresh manually to load new data immediately.

states.unconfiguredDescription: Add the database and analytics environment variables, then run the analytics migration to start collecting requests.
states.emptyDescription: Requests will appear after the runtime emits its first signed analytics events.
states.linkEmptyTitle: No requests for this link yet
states.linkEmptyDescription: This link is tracked, but no matching requests were observed in the selected period.
states.notFoundDescription: The analytics ID does not exist or is no longer available.
states.errorDescription: The data service returned an unexpected error. You can retry without losing any changes.

metrics.title: Automation metrics
metrics.description: Large values are samples actually stored; estimates below are sampling-adjusted references.

trend.title: Automation trend
trend.description: Stored declared-bot and suspected-automation samples over time.
trend.accessibleTitle: Observed declared-bot and suspected-automation samples over time

ranking.title: Links most visited by automation
ranking.description: Tracked links ranked by observed declared-bot and suspected-automation samples.
ranking.empty: No automated visits to tracked links were observed in this period.
ranking.tableCaption: Tracked links ranked by automated requests

breakdowns.title: Automation classification
breakdowns.description: Bars use observed samples with estimated references shown below. Suspected automation is not a confirmed bot.
breakdowns.detectionDescription: Why traffic was classified as a bot, suspected automation, or a security probe. Suspected does not mean confirmed.
breakdowns.handlingDescription: Which resources automation requested, whether a route matched, and how processing ended.

states.emptyDescription: Declared bots, suspected automation, and unmatched requests will appear after the runtime reports them.
